﻿MODULE 8 EVERGREEN LAUNCH

Welcome to Module 8 of Product Launch Formula. This is where you take your entire Internal Launch sequence and put it on autopilot. By the end of this module you’ll be able to take the concepts and strategies of the Internal Launch and adapt them to the Evergreen Launch.

1 Introduction [2 minutes]
This lesson will introduce you to the Evergreen Launch and when to use this type of launch in your business.

2 Evergreen Launch Strategy [13 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn about the Evergreen Launch strategy. Unlike the Internal Launch which is a big event, in an Evergreen Launch, all new leads coming in to your business are automatically delivered a sequence that leads them into an offer.

3 Types of Evergreen Launches [10 minutes]
There are four main types of Evergreen Launches. In this lesson you'll learn about each of them and when to use them.

4 Making Your Launch Evergreen [11 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn how to turn your various launch assets - from your emails to your PLC videos to your sales page - into evergreen assets.

5 Scarcity in Evergreen Launches [4 minutes]
Scarcity is one of the most powerful mental triggers and is essential in an Evergreen Launch. In this lesson you'll learn the three main ways to create scarcity in an Evergreen Launch, even if your offer is technically always available.

6 Evergreen Launch Case Study [9 minutes]
In this case study, you'll see a real-life example of how another PLF Owner, Oonagh Duncan, has set up an Evergreen Launch.

7 Evergreen Launch Walkthrough [5 minutes]
In this lesson, you'll see my walkthrough of the email sequences and web pages in Oonagh Duncan's Evergreen Launch.
 
8 Evergreen Launch Planner [no video]
The Evergreen Launch Planner is a step-by-step action guide to help you plan out and execute your Evergreen Launch.
